description:
You are acting as a mobile build-pipeline engineer.  
Inside your workspace the Android build-tool versions live under  

/home/user/build-tools/android/  

The directory already contains two real sub-directories named  

1. v33/   – the currently deployed version  
2. v34/   – the new version that QA has just approved  

There is also an existing symbolic link called  

/home/user/build-tools/android/current  

which presently points to v33.  
Your task is to update this link so that it points to v34 instead.

After adjusting the link, create (or overwrite if it already exists) a tiny, one-line log file called  

/home/user/build-tools/link_update.log  

The file must contain exactly this single line (with no leading or trailing blanks and followed by a single trailing newline character):

current → v34

Notes and requirements the automatic grader will check:

1. The object at /home/user/build-tools/android/current **must** be a symbolic link, not a directory or a regular file.  
2. readlink -f /home/user/build-tools/android/current must resolve to /home/user/build-tools/android/v34  
3. The log file /home/user/build-tools/link_update.log must exist, must be a regular text file, and its sole content must match the line specified above, concluded by exactly one newline.  
4. You may accomplish everything with a single terminal command if you wish (e.g., using ln -sf), but how you do it is up to you.

No other files or directories should be modified or created.
truth:
Initial state before the agent starts:

Directories:
/home/user/build-tools/android/
/home/user/build-tools/android/v33/
/home/user/build-tools/android/v34/

Symbolic link:
/home/user/build-tools/android/current  →  /home/user/build-tools/android/v33

File permissions: all directories are 0755; the existing symlink inherits default permissions.

Desired final state for verification:

1. Symlink:
/home/user/build-tools/android/current  →  /home/user/build-tools/android/v34

2. Log file:
Path: /home/user/build-tools/link_update.log
Permissions: 0644
Exact content (including trailing newline):
current → v34\n
